segments.text: Today we are worshipping Adi Shakti, I think this is the most important puja because it
Is The power of Adishakti that has given you Self-realization.
That Has Given You The Truth.
love that has given you the power of compassion and love.
That's a Power, that separated from Sagashiva and this Power wanted Herself to create
This complete Universe, Universes after Universes She is creative and loving with
With Her love She did this great creation, creation of this world also.
This is a specially selected planet which was very beautifully brought in the center
between The Sun and Moon for the creation ultimately by human beings.
This is her great work, with such love and affection.
And we have very good hope that Her children will know the truth
– they'll get their ultimate knowledge about themselves
…and everything else as you read in the Bible
about how Adi Shakti came in the form of a snake and told human beings that you have
to know for knowledge Adam, Eve. And they accepted to eat the fruit
of knowledge, because they would have remained just like animals without knowing anything
subtleties in life – little higher-animals maybe.
That once the ate a fruit and started feeding that there is something wrong with way
They are without any clothes, so they brought some leaves up the tree and covered themselves.
So first knowledge came was of chastity because Shri Ganesha was established
And His influence brought forth this consciousness that we have to cover our bodies
We are no more animals, only the animals – of course they're not standings so it's
all right.
Are not aware offit with a knowledge of chastity gradually human beings started growing into
beautiful nations but there were many things which we still to be known ,to be aware
You may be aware of many things, but unless and until you get your spiritual awakening
–unless-and-untilyougetyourselfknowledge all other knowledge is absolutely nothing.
With this self-knowledge only you become powerful.
The real power, the Real Power is of love and compassion
Today when You see
whole world busy fighting
And they are trying to protect people from wars
and creating great, huge protecting instruments.
The whole world seems to be in a mad race of killing each other or destroying
each other of competition, ambition leading to fighting and then into greater wars.
They are fighting for a piece land so ignorant they're can you carry even a pinch
of this land with you, when You die? When we are born We come with closed streets. When
You die You go With open hands! What do I take with me? All right –you may not like
to take anything but Do you enjoy whatever is so great for which you're fighting?
Why this fighting going on among all nonsensical people?
It's surprising how
People give up their peace,
Give-up there understanding
When it comes to a piece of land.
And the whole thing has moved into
A very wrong direction and
Going towards complete destruction
The thing that has made human beings so much suffering because of all their ignorance by
which they have, All those habits –all these attractions- all this anti-terrification
which is so ruinous, which will ruin all of them each one by one.
They have to take two cells and they
have to take, through their self-knowledge.
Self knowledge is the key for a savior –to give to people!
We had so many saints we've got so many Sufis
people, we had Zen-people. All kinds of realized souls came on this earth – they all suffered
and were tortured but nobody understood them! But now the time has come for you to know
the truth, but truth which is not dry – truth that has compassion.
Truth that encompasses everyone and brings a complete view of our existence."
Why are we here on this earth?
What's your purpose?"
What should we do?
Adi Shaktis' powers are such of love and compassion.
That makes you understand yourself first,
the Love for You is very limited
there's no awareness your own being
just imagine what a great task it was
how much have to be seriously
becoming aware of yourself first.
That is extremely important!
First you have to be aware
and now,
You've got the light in your spirit
In that light
You can see what you are
And how far you're going
How wrong things
What harm
you do
yourself, and you have a power to cure it –to improve
It. And come your senses
These are the most important times
You'll never get these time again
Never had in history
And can't ever get
In future
This is The Time you've got
Not only the awareness
not only the self-knowledge, but you know how to do it.
Otherwise about The Saints
About those people Tao and Zen people
they have just described what a person with
Self knowledge is
How he behaves
how his style is,
How he's so different from others.
But none of them have said
''How you become that?''
No one has been able to say
Nobody had been able
To do also
Because perhaps
Most didn't know about Kundalini
And those who knew
Also could not talk
About it
So the greatest work
Adi Shakti is to put the Kundalini in your sacrum bone.
This kundalini, it's not the Adishakti, Adishaktis a much greater thing ,much bigger
things .Much wider think..
Much deeper...
Much stronger....
Kundalini is the reflection of Adi Shaktipower and when she rises, you know what happens
to You.
And how do get your Realization?
But we have be very watchful – are really a compassionate person if you're compassionate?
The first thing that will happen to any compassionate person, I think
Will be
To help others
To emancipate others
They cannot be satisfied
With their own achievements
And with there state of self-realization
It can not happened
What was the need for Adi Shakti
to do all these efforts, to work so hard.
You know that I had worked very-very hard but from my childhood I have worked very hard
and gone through difficult times according human understanding
But the worst time I have, when i see those people whom
I've given realization. Those who are self-realized
People they're all the ones
Who had no responsibility for others
and if there is it's very little
They don't that compassion
And dont'have love
That we haveto today save the world
save the humanity. That's our, not only our principle work but
The Only Work that we have to do
All other things are going achieve nothing
except for your own efforts
individual effort to give Self-realization
To others and Give them this knowledge
This knowledge is so, so easy to understand.
It's very subtle no doubt and as I've told you that the quantum theory they're
talking about now –the scientists–is
That They have seen those miraculous waves of lights
And their trying to find out something about it
And it cannot be that some Sahaja Yogis will rise about others.
Every one of you have to know, this is a very special thing which has happened even
if he had gone Himalayas and starved himself or been singing the praise God for years
Even you had done all kinds of rituals and penances,
You could not have got your realization.
That would never happen possible!
I knew this
And that's why
i have to work very hard
Facing all kind problems
All kinds of turmoils
All kinds pressures
What was the thing?
Just
To see that you all are created and You're on My hands.
You have to work, every finger has do it!
That is what I've been telling you – now It's our responsibility
to see that we become not only Sahaja Yogis ourselves, but blossoming time and many-many
Sahaj yogies you should have.
It's a work of Adi Shakti – try understand this!
It's not work of any saint, it is not the work of any incarnation.
Is not a work for any politician and no work on big leader.
It is the work of Adi Shakti which is so transparently showing its results in you.
Now it's for You to see, please Me with your ardent desire I know –
I see how you love Me and how You want to do for me.
The greatest thing that can be done is to spread Sahaja Yoga, it's a very special
extremely difficult blessing you have got –you didn't need any efforts, you didn'
have to pay any money, you don't have get sick with rituals.
You got it spontaneously but that doesn' t mean its sort of your birth right is the
work and Adi Shakti has been shown in your life as a compassion without any reward people
People have tried to spread their religion by showing compassion for poor people, looking
after the poor and handicapped.
There is no need actually of Sahaja Yogis do that – what they had done was transform
other people's lives.
Find out ways or methods how you can transform them?
How will you spread the message about Adi Shakti?
Put your mind to it and you will know how you can manage.
There should be all the time a compelling desire
that we have find out method by which
We spread Sahaja Yoga, otherwise
It's like what Christ has described
That some seed fell on the marshy land
And they sprouted, but never grew.
You can only grow in the real sense of world and become something very-very special
by knowing what you could do
I have a vision no doubt
But it ends up with puja is not good
I know some countries are very difficult, try to find out what is the problem.
Why?
It's so very different attention has been paid for this that other human beings are
doing destroy themselves as if it was part and parcel of same game which we call
as the Last Judgment, but let us through our compassion and love save
As many as possible. This is
The work of Adi Shakti not
Not a Work for any saint or any incarnation
They are all there no doubt
they're All with Us
All time to help us
But you people have the power
Of Adishakti which Is very great
very penetrating, which is miraculous. It's so effective but unless and until you become
aware of your own powers how will work it out?
It would be like a dead machine that has everything, but nobody is there to work it out.
All the time I had go through very hazardous times and sometimes felt as if we have
take another birth. The way things were so difficult for Me, but now
–for you it has been very easy as if the one who makes
a road had to work really hard–but those
walk on that they don't realize how easily
They have got it and If they realize this then
And they will realize also, he let many walk on this road which was created with such patience
understanding and I have to really see you all Sahaja Yogis doing your level best
to change this world has to be changed, as it is humanity.
Has to saved through you and nobody else! No president no prime minister
none of these people can save the world and save it.
It's You are entitled. You have got this power do you realize your own state
Your own being which has risen so high, it is not there.
If that realization was there you would go all out to express your love and compassion
for other people –to make them realize what they are.
Only with Sahaja Yoga can save this world.
There's no other way out!
Whatever you may try, say to help the poor or to help this and that is something very
superficial.
The best thing it give realization for every person we have seen children they are coming
up there will be great Sahaja Yogis also I can see them but before then your own
merits of what you have done.
It's not a static work, it is big movement which has to be really explosive and unless
or until such great step is taken I don't know who will blame for the doomsday?
You are the one who have to build up the destiny of human beings.
Don't consider yourself as something nothing, you could never
had got your realization –you would've come to Me among so
many…You're ones that came and asked for realization and
You know it cannot be forced, this realization can not be forced and the growth of this awareness
also.
Cannot be forced you have to develop that attention deep down within yourself see for
What you have done, what do You've done if you are still busy with the money problem
or power problems and this problem that.
Your a problem your not a sahaja yogi.
Sahajyogi is above everything else
And it's very powerful

power of love and compassion.

it's the only act
of loving others
but
t i s
a powerful
personality that you will have
which we'll just emit
That great divine light

otherwise everybody used to write me
this is wrong with Me and that it's wrong

i must say much less

attention should Be changed

leader Will write To me the wise leader will write to me

but attention always goes now the compassion part

they can cure them.

Into good people

is how many people we're giving realization?

it' s all right

cruelty

all these diseases

that when

You're completely protected!
Who protects you?
We may say the Adi Shakti all right
but also there is a destructive power working in this world
not of negativity
But positive destructive Power of Shiva
If He says that if Adishaktis work is going on well
He's happy.
But he is sitting there and watching each person, every work of Sahaja Yogis – if

She destroys…
I cannot go up to that point.
He destroys, not only destroys – thousands he can destroy!
Anywhere there is a calamity we say like an earthquake or some sort of hurricane all

But if you really give realization to people, all these can be aborted.
Of course it is the whim I should say of Ari Shakti that she started this work

but your responsibility's also very important
You cannot be responsible, maybe it was I felt my responsibility but there's a difference.

That the work, that kind of personality you should have

In an beautiful way.

How your supported
and everything works out

You change their lives

Such oneness!

to be afraid me but being afraid yourself have

The Light Of Love, compassion which is divine

It is a divine love which works, and that's what makes me sometimes little weak when

You havenot realized WhatYou'v egot and don t respect yourself still if

That's my dream and I hope you all will work it out.
